creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
sylvio      2010-02-02 23:54:09 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-Test-Synopsis Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Test::Synopsis is an (author) test module to find .pm or .pod files under your lib directory and then make sure the example snippet code in your SYNOPSIS section passes the perl compile check.
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Test-Synopsis/
  
  PR:             ports/142908
  Submitted by:   Takuya Tsuchida <tsucchi@cpan.org>
  Approved by:    miwi (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3810    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/devel/p5-Test-Synopsis/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-Test-Synopsis/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/p5-Test-Synopsis/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-Test-Synopsis/pkg-plist (new)
